headline: China draws two live-fire boxes off Dongshan
deck: Beijing announced two days of shooting in the Taiwan Strait. The published geometry describes a bounded coastal drill, while the notice and timing preserve its coercive signal.
body: Chinese maritime authorities announced live-fire activity in two areas near Dongshan Island for Thursday and Friday, from 06:00 to 18:00 each day. The notice barred vessels from entering the published boxes while shooting was under way. [E1][E2]

Taiwan’s Maritime and Port Bureau said the zones lay outside waters under its control and did not affect domestic routes. Its preliminary measurements placed the nearer geometry west of the strait’s median line and more than 50 nautical miles from Kinmen and Penghu. [E1][E3]

Coordinates put a useful limit on the headline. These were bounded boxes off Fujian rather than an encirclement of Taiwan or a closure of the central strait. Ships could route around them, and Taipei reported no interruption to traffic in Taiwanese waters. [E1][E2]

The drill still carries a political message. Publishing a navigation warning converts a military activity into a temporary claim on civilian sea space, and repeating the closure across two daylight windows makes the signal visible to shipping and officials on both sides. The low operational cost is part of the instrument. [E1][E2]

Location also matters more than spectacle. Dongshan sits on the Chinese coast opposite the southern part of the strait, near established training waters. A drill close to that shore can rehearse weapons and warning procedures without assuming the risk of pushing units deep across the median line. [E2][E4]

The boring explanation is a scheduled coastal range activity that received unusual attention because every notice in the strait now arrives inside a crisis narrative. Evidence for a larger operation would include additional zones, airspace notices, force movements around Taiwan or sustained route disruption. None was established in the notices available by the edition bell. [E1][E2][E4]

This is how coercion often travels in the strait: a real military event, a carefully chosen patch of water and an audience invited to imagine the next ring outward. The coordinates keep the present tense honest. The repetition keeps the future tense uncomfortable. [E1][E2]

evidence_box.fragment: 連兩天在台灣海峽部分海域實彈射擊

evidence_box.source: Taiwan Maritime and Port Bureau statement reported by Yahoo Taiwan
China Maritime Safety Administration notice relayed by CNA

art.title: The bounded signal
art.caption: Two daytime live-fire areas were announced off Dongshan on the Fujian coast · Map: Sprockett, Escalation Desk · Terrain: NOAA ETOPO1
